name: the-want-floods-in
prompt: Close-up on young woman with glasses. Eyes wide with shock, glasses slightly fogged. Pink energy radiating around her face. Power absorption overwhelming her. Expression of intense concentration. Medical professional processing unexpected input. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

name: mira-overwhelmed
prompt: Medium shot young woman with cardigan and glasses leaning over patient on medical bed. One hand hovering over silver-haired woman lying down, pink healing energy glowing at her palm. Other hand pressed to her own chest. Flush spreading across cheeks. Body trembling while maintaining the healing connection. Pink magenta warmth bleeding into frame. Clinical infirmary behind her. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, bold expressions, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading

dialogue.speaker: Mira
dialogue.text: For him. She wants him this badly.

bubble: Internal thought from Mira, medium shot face visible, place thought bubble TOP as internal monologue

name: eyes-meet
